title: CIA Reading Room cia-rdp82-00457r000200030007-3: SELANGOR CHINESE IN SUPPORT OF TAN KAH KEE
description: Sanitized - Approved For R e     : CIA-RDP82-0045700 CoR  INTEU-IGENCE GROUP INTELLIGENCE REPORT COUNTpi,y  Malaya SUBJECT ORIGIN 25X1X6 25X1A9a DATE:   25X1 X6 WFO. Selangor Chinese in Support of Tan Kah Kee  01St  11 December 1946 25X1A6a                                     PAGES   1 SUPPLEMENT Members of the Presidium of the Public Meeting of Selangor public bodies and community leaders in support of Mr. Tan Kah Kee dispatched a telegram 10 October 1946 to President Truman, General Marshall, Dr. Leighton Stuart, all newspapers, news agencies, public leaders and public organizations in the United States of America via the Associated Press expressing support of Tan Kah lee's telegram of 10 September demanding the immediate withdrawal of all American armed forces from China and the cessation of all forms of assistance rendered to the Chinese ftomintang government. Chairman, Selsngor General Labour t'nio 2.  The following were signatories to the above telegram: Chairman, China Democrat
